panel.title: Communication Profile
panel.subtitle: How this client wants the AI to talk to their leads.

summary.title: Communication Profile
summary.subtitle: Saved answers from the onboarding wizard.
summary.empty: No communication profile yet. Start the wizard to set one up.

pricing.label: Pricing approach
pricing.help: How does pricing work? Fixed prices, quote-based, price ranges? What should the assistant say when a lead asks about cost?

discounts.label: Discounts
discounts.help: Do you offer discounts? Under what conditions? Should the assistant ever mention or offer them?

financing.label: Financing & payment terms
financing.help: Do you offer financing or instalments? What are the standard payment terms (deposit, milestones)?

leadTimes.label: Lead times
leadTimes.help: How long from order to delivery/installation? What should the assistant tell a lead who asks?

guarantees.label: Guarantees & warranty
guarantees.help: What guarantees or warranties do you offer? Anything the assistant can mention to build trust?

serviceArea.label: Service area
serviceArea.help: Which regions or cities do you serve? Are there areas you do not cover?

included.label: What is included
included.help: What is included in a standard project or quote (design, installation, materials, aftercare)?

objection.label: Common objection & response
objection.help: What is the most common objection or hesitation, and what is your best response to it?

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.help: Any other questions leads ask often, with the answers the assistant should give?

openingStyle.label: Which opening style fits you best?

personal.label: Personal
personal.example: Hi Jan, dit is Thomas van Gourmet Kitchen Designs. Ik kom nog even terug op de offerte die jullie een tijdje geleden bij ons hebben laten maken. Klopt dat?

project.label: Project-focused
project.example: Hi Jan, Thomas hier van Gourmet Kitchen Designs. Jullie hebben eerder een ontwerp en voorstel van ons ontvangen. Ik was benieuwd of dit nog speelt.

business.label: Businesslike
business.example: Hi Jan, Thomas van Gourmet Kitchen Designs. Ik zag dat we eerder een voorstel voor jullie hebben uitgewerkt en vroeg me af hoe de situatie inmiddels is veranderd.

statusQuestion.label: Which status question fits you best?

traject.label: Journey
traject.example: Waar staan jullie momenteel in het traject?

project.label: Project
project.example: Hoe kijken jullie momenteel naar het project?

besluitvorming.label: Decision-making
besluitvorming.example: Waar staan jullie momenteel in jullie besluitvorming?

contactApproach.label: How do you normally reach out?

awaiting.label: Reserved
awaiting.example: Ik was benieuwd hoe jullie er momenteel in staan.

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.example: Ik wilde even horen waar jullie momenteel staan.

proactive.label: Proactive
proactive.example: Ik dacht, ik neem even contact op om te horen waar jullie momenteel staan.

distinctive.label: What do customers most often find distinctive about you?

preferredWords.label: Which words do you prefer to use?

formality.label: How formal may the communication be?

perception.label: How do you want to come across? Choose up to 3.

agentName.label: Which name do we use in conversations?
agentName.help: The name is used as the sender of WhatsApp conversations and follow-up messages. Which name fits your showroom best?
agentName.notePlaceholder: Why this name fits your showroom (optional)
